underlying_goal: Fix misnamed TV episode files by validating episode content against online transcripts and renaming them correctly
friction_detail: Initial NFO keyword approach produced many false matches; Claude also changed filename regex to accept bare names when user wanted to prompt for prefix addition instead.
brief_summary: User wanted to validate and fix misnamed Friends episode files using transcript matching; Claude iteratively built and refined the script, successfully fixing S04, S05, and S07, with S06 remaining partially unresolved due to missing subtitles.
